description_long: This is a modern, boxy residential house with a flat roof and a rooftop terrace featuring green landscaping and a small structure, possibly a rooftop utility or lounge area. The exterior is clad in a mix of dark and medium brown materials, likely brick or composite panels, with large, rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The front facade features a prominent glass entryway with a paved walkway leading up to it, flanked by manicured shrubs and surrounded by several trees. The house has three visible stories, with the uppermost level set back to create a rooftop garden space. The landscaping around the house includes a driveway, grass patches, and a variety of trees, giving it a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood feel. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of natural and modern materials.
description: A modern, three-story house with a flat roof, rooftop terrace, large windows, and landscaped surroundings. The exterior features dark and brown cladding, glass entry, and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass entryway, paved walkway, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rooftop terrace, green roof area, and the driveway leading to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more windows, a secondary structure on the roof, and additional trees around the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible landscaping, side windows, and the continuation of the paved driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Large glass door entry with paved steps, flanked by shrubs and trees, no porch or columns, minimalist modern style.
